title: Example: Enable Email Data Verification Fields
heading_path: Example: Enable Email Data Verification Fields
text:
Learn how to select and include email Data Verification Fields for documents in Docusign envelopes or templates.

This example shows how to use email Data Verification Fields to verify email addresses for
documents in Docusign envelopes or templates.

1. Start an envelope with the Send an Envelope option or use
   a template.
2. Upload your files and add recipients as usual.
3. In the field explorer, select the Custom Fields
   icon.
4. Select the Email Address field, and drag the
   Email Address fields to the document.
5. Select the Email Address to display the customization
   pane on the right side of the page.
6. Select an email address verification app.

   ![A screenshot of email Data Verification field configuration.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvnewemailconfigoptions.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyMzYsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.x0Olo4Yjxk2i2COCsa4h8cY_4HtiXdMfE4Bc9JDwvbI&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of email Data Verification field configuration.")
7. Select Must verify to sign to prevent recipients from
   completing the envelope unless this verification successfully passes.

   Note:

   The Must verify to sign is an optional setting. Be
   selective when selecting this setting to avoid false negatives. If you
   choose not to turn on the Must verify to sign
   setting, the data entered into the verification fields are verified in
   real-time during signing.
8. After you've added any additional fields, select
   Send.

   For detailed information about sending envelopes, see the [Sending Documents for
   Signature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=ulp1643236876813&topicId=lak1578456412477.html&_LANG=enus) article.

title: Example: Enable Phone Number Data Verification Fields

text:
Learn how to select and include Phone Number Data Verification Fields for documents in
Docusign envelopes or templates.

This example shows how to select and include phone number Data Verification Fields with Vonage
for documents in Docusign envelopes or templates.

1. Start an envelope with the Send an Envelope option or use
   a template.
2. Upload your files and add recipients as usual.
3. In the field explorer, select Phone Number to view the
   Phone Number fields.

   ![A screenshot of the Data Verification phone number fields.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvphonefields.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyMzksInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.Xq9M6wve9PskxnUYCkjWFYDsN_ryCn-c4DyXUpb2iHw&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Data Verification phone number fields.")

   Important: Signers will not be allowed to
   continue unless they complete all the Phone Number fields. Signers must
   enter both the Country Code and Phone Number for data verification.
4. Drag the Phone Number fields to the document.
5. Select the Phone Number.

   The Phone Number fields display on the right side of
   the page. Make sure Vonage displays in the App field.

   ![A screenshot of the Data Verification phone number field configuration.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvvonagecustom.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyMzksInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.Xq9M6wve9PskxnUYCkjWFYDsN_ryCn-c4DyXUpb2iHw&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Data Verification phone number field configuration.")
6. Select Must verify to sign to prevent recipients from
   completing the envelope unless this verification successfully passes.

   Note:

   The Must verify to sign is an optional setting. Be
   selective when selecting this setting to avoid false negatives. If you
   choose not to turn on the Must verify to sign
   setting, the data entered into the verification fields added to your
   document are still verified in real-time during signing.
7. After you've added any additional fields, select
   Send.

   For detailed information about sending envelopes, see the [Sending Documents for
   Signature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=ulp1643236876813&topicId=lak1578456412477.html&_LANG=enus) article.

title: Install Docusign Apps for Data Verification
heading_path: Install Docusign Apps for Data Verification
text:
Learn how to install Data Verification apps from the Docusign App Center.

Docusign App Center is a place to discover and install partner applications that extend Docusign product capabilities. The App Center provides apps that you can use for Data Verification in your Docusign envelopes or templates.

For information about Docusign App Center, see the [Welcome to Docusign App Center](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=ous1698169987748&topicId=ijy1698170251179.html&_LANG=enus) article.

Private apps provides custom data verification fields for your organization.") article for information about creating and installing a Custom Data Verification app for your organization.

1. Determine your assigned permissions as described in the  [Permission Profiles](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390.ditamap&topicId=pof1583277362435.html&_LANG=enus) article.

title: Use a Certificate of Completion to Review Data Verification Events
heading_path: Use a Certificate of Completion to Review Data Verification Events
text:
Learn about using a signer's Certificate of Completion (CoC) to determine whether the
signer successfully completed Data Verification fields.

Use an envelope's Certificate of Completion (CoC) to determine whether the signer successfully
completed the Data Verification fields.

For Data Verification, the CoC shows:

- If the data verification was complete, and if the verification succeeded or
  failed
- The user who entered the data
- The Data Verification fields or fields mapped to extension apps
- The name and version of the extension app that provides the verification

For detailed information, see the [Certificate of
Completion](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=oeq1643226594604&topicId=gpa1578456339545.html&_LANG=enus) article.

1. From the Manage page, locate the envelope by searching, filtering, or simply
   scanning the list.

   Note: To view the Certificate of Completion while signing a document, see
   the [Sign a Document With Data Verification Fields](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=vyg1698168078020.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to sign a document that has fields with data that must be verified before successfully signing the document.") article.
2. Select the envelope to show the Details view.
3. To download and view the Certificate of Completion PDF, select the Downloaded
   icon and select Certificate of Completion.

   ![A screenshot of selecting the envelope's Certificate of Completion.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/signnewdownload.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNTgsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.z-vHwvWelljptPbTJfOVE1-u0J26q1LDmJ47RzNhDN8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of selecting the envelope's Certificate of Completion.")

   The Certificate of Completion downloads to your local Download folder.

   The following example shows Data Verification fields activity.

   ![Sample envelope Certificate of Completion with Data Verification information.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvviewcoc.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNTgsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.z-vHwvWelljptPbTJfOVE1-u0J26q1LDmJ47RzNhDN8&_LANG=enus "Sample envelope Certificate of Completion with Data Verification information.")

title: Data Verification Issues for Signing
text:
Learn about issues that can occur when signing an agreement with Docusign Data Verification fields.

Here are some issues that can occur when signing agreements with Data Verification fields.

| Issue | Context | Solution |
| --- | --- | --- |
| You entered information in a Data Verification field, but you're not prompted to verify the information. | You may have quickly moved through multiple fields and the system is catching up. | Refresh the page.  Select Other Signing Actions  > Finish later and try again. |
| You're confident that the information in the field is correct, but verification attempts fail. | The databases for the verification providers may have limitations. Or there may be formatting errors in your input. | Check the format of the data that you entered to ensure it meets field input requirements. For example:   - The phone number must start with a country code. - The email address must include proper email syntax, with an   email prefix and an email domain. |
| You're confident that the information in the field is incorrect, but verification is passed. | There may be verification provider's database limitations. | To learn more about the reason for each verification result, contact the sender. During Beta, sending accounts must contact [Docusign Support](https://support.docusign.com/s/articles/How-do-I-contact-DocuSign-Customer-Support) for more information than is available in the envelope history. |
| A `Verification Failed` message displays with no explanation | Verification results may not be compatible with the signing process. | Ask the sender to void and resend the envelope. |
| You cannot finish signing the agreement because a Data Verification field failed validation. | The sender blocks signers from finishing the envelope unless they pass verification. | Ask the sender to void or resend the envelope with verification turned off. |

title: Docusign Custom Data Verification for Your Organization
heading_path: Docusign Custom Data Verification for Your Organization
text:
Learn about Docusign custom data verification fields that let you
verify agreement data against your internal systems in real time.

In addition to using prebuilt extension apps from the Docusign
[App Center](https://www.docusign.com/products/platform/app-center), you can now build your own private extension
apps to verify data against your internal databases, or the web service of your
choice.

You can confirm data against your private sources using the [Connected Fields API](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/connected-fields-api/concepts/). Your developers support this effort by
building private extension apps to securely verify agreement data against internal
systems in real time.

With Custom Data Verification, you can:

Connect with internal systems
:   Build private extension apps that verify data against internal proprietary
    data sources, or any authoritative data source of your choice.

Create custom Connected Fields for your agreements
:   Develop custom data models that align to your specific template needs and
    integrate seamlessly with your custom extension apps. Your Connected Fields
    show up in the eSignature envelope preparation for all of your envelopes and
    envelope templates.

Drive greater automation
:   Verify and auto-fill data from private data sources to reduce manual entry
    and completion time. This can occur during envelope signing and
    form-filling.

See the [Create a Private Docusign Data
Verification App](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=bpc1740167704919.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to create a private Custom private app for data verification , eSignature, or other Docusign features. Private apps provides custom data verification fields for your organization.") article to learn how to create a custom data
verification app and data verification fields.

title: Example: Enable Postal Address Data Verification Fields
heading_path: Example: Enable Postal Address Data Verification Fields
text:

   Note: Fields with asterisks (\*) are required.
6. Drag the Postal Address field group to the

   field.

   This example shows the Street configuration fields.

   ![A screenshot of the DocusignData Verification Postal Address street field configuration.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvsetupbankfields.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNDQsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.SQDA4DxDyWa4tbxe_9FUAt7wrHCtOFJ6kXpbntEf54o&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the DocusignData Verification Postal Address street field configuration.")

title: Understand Docusign Extension Apps' Verification Definition
heading_path: Understand Docusign Extension Apps' Verification Definition
text:
Learn how Docusign Data Verification partner apps works and what kind
of information is verified.

As an administrator or agreement preparer, you must understand the verification definitions
implemented by each Data Verification partner app. Doing so ensures that it suits your
business needs and business processes that use agreement data and associated
verification.

What is Verification definition?
:   Verification definition includes:

    - What is being verified: Required input information
    - Why it's verified: The criteria or logic that determines if an attempt to verify is
      successful

Where can I find Data Verification Apps information?
:   Review the app's information in the [Docusign App Center](https://apps.docusign.com/app-center). Each app has a feature
    summary. Additionally, there is an example for incorporating the app's features
    in a workflow.

What is Data Verification app coverage?
:   Coverage varies across with external verification services. The coverage can include items
    such as countries, geographic regions, jurisdictions, data types, data
    sources.

title: Use Envelope History to Review Data Verification Events
heading_path: Use Envelope History to Review Data Verification Events
text:
Learn about whether a signer successfully completed a data verification field using your
account's eSignature envelope history.

Using your account's envelope history, as described in the [Envelope History](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=oeq1643226594604&topicId=dpr1578456338693.html&_LANG=enus) article, you can view whether a signer successfully completed Data Verification fields.

The history logs the final result for every verification attempt by each signer.

1. In your eSignature account, select Manage to view a list
   of envelopes.

   Note: To view the Envelope History while signing a
   document, see the [Sign a Document With Data Verification Fields](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=vyg1698168078020.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to sign a document that has fields with data that must be verified before successfully signing the document.") article.
2. Select a completed envelope that contains verified data.
3. Select View Envelope History.

   The envelope history shows which Data Verification fields were successfully and
   unsuccessfully verified, as shown in this example.

   ![A screenshot of a document's envelope history with Data Verification information.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvreport.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNTUsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.TjdsEuTpQYE7FOwN_K5ptvJsn878z4I0ZciTlYy6oy8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a document's envelope history with Data Verification information.")

   This example shows that after an initial failure, the signer successfully
   entered the data and signed the envelope.

title: Sign a Document With Data Verification Fields
heading_path: Sign a Document With Data Verification Fields
text:
Learn how to sign a document that has fields with data that must be verified before
successfully signing the document.

With Data Verification Fields in a Docusign document, the verified data is
authenticated against data sources in real-time. For example, when completing an
employment application, you must verify your email address and phone number.

When you complete the signing field entries, the information you enter is
authenticated by a third-party application. Upon verification, you can complete the
signing.

Note: Your organization may create custom Data Verification Fields specific
to your company. See the [Data Verification
Field Types](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=omw1740164520691.html&_LANG=enus) article for details.

1. Open the document as described in the [Get Started on the Docusign Signing Welcome Page](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=uwx1573854978359.html&_LANG=enus) article.
2. Fields that require verification are indicated by a tool tip when you hover
   over them, as shown in the following example:

   ![An example of a tool tip for a data field that must be verified when signing a document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvreqfieldtip.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNjAsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.314MinoWxZQXU5n-O6cpESn-qMIRWLsqlmF-N6JukvY&_LANG=enus "An example of a tool tip for a data field that must be verified when signing a document.")
3. Enter the information and go to the next field.

   Note: If you're entering a phone number, you
   are required to include both the country code and phone number.

   While validating, the system displays the following message:

   `Verifying data`
4. If you correctly entered the information, you received a verification
   confirmation message.

   `Verification succeeded`
5. If you incorrectly entered the information, you receive a failed verification
   message:

   `Verification failed`

   Review and reenter your information.
6. Continue entering information in any subsequent fields.

   ![A screenshot of a sample document with Data Verification Fields.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/signing-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNjAsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.314MinoWxZQXU5n-O6cpESn-qMIRWLsqlmF-N6JukvY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample document with Data Verification Fields.")
7. Select Finish to complete the signing process.
8. To review the audit trail details about the agreements you signed, select the
   vertical three-dot menu and select View History to view
   the envelope history or View Certificate to view the
   Certificate of Completion.

   ![A screenshot of the Other Actions menu audit trail options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/signnewviewcert.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNjAsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.314MinoWxZQXU5n-O6cpESn-qMIRWLsqlmF-N6JukvY&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Other Actions menu audit trail options.")

   See these articles for detailed audit information:

   - [Envelope history](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=uro1698158848949.html): Includes a list of sender
     and recipient activities to date
   - [Certificate of Completion](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=qjs1701290377826.html): Includes the
     identifying information about the envelope and complete details of the
     envelope events

title: Use Address Auto-Suggestion Fields
text:
Learn how to use the Smarty extension app physical address auto-suggestions fields to
enter address fields easily and accurately in Docusign envelopes and
documents.

The [Smarty extension app](https://apps.docusign.com/app-center/app/04bfc1ae-1ba0-42d0-8c02-264417a7b234) provides accurate type-ahead
address suggestions. Using Smarty, Docusign envelope recipients
can easily and accurately enter address fields in Docusign
envelopes and documents. With Smarty, signers can:

- Enter at least one address line to start an address prediction. This can
  decrease 80% of the keystrokes typically required to enter an address.
- View a list of suggested addresses for faster agreement completion.
- Receive support in 242 countries as described in the [Supported Countries](https://www.smarty.com/docs/cloud/international-address-autocomplete-api#supported-country-codes) article.

Before you begin

Make sure that the Smarty extension app is available to use. Find and select the
Smarty app in the [Docusign App Center](https://apps.docusign.com/app-center) to display the
Smarty listing page.

If the Smarty app:

- Is not installed for your account. See the [Install Docusign Apps for Data Verification](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=pyp1698158616536.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to install Data Verification apps from the Docusign App Center.")
  article to learn about installing the app.
- Is already installed, select Use this App. The system
  displays your Docusign account Agreements page. You can start
  an envelope.

Tip: Including the Country field value narrows down
the auto-complete results. If you're using envelope templates:

- Include the Country field
- Consider placing the Country field as the first (at the top) address
  field.

Note: If the Country field is empty, the signer’s detected browser
location determines the country.

1. Start an envelope with the Send an Envelope option or use
   a template.
2. Upload your files and add recipients as usual.
3. In the field explorer, select Address from the Standard
   Fields to display the Smarty address fields.

   ![A screenshot showing selecting the address fields for an envelope.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvsmartyseladdress.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNDYsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.6i1WE8oBQW_ZgW5Iz3f4dzVw0D0nRFsUaPbE7VnYXdQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot showing selecting the address fields for an envelope.")
4. Drag the Address field group to the document.

   This example shows the Smarty app's address fields.

   ![A screenshot of the Smarty app auto-suggestion address fields.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvsmartyavailablefields.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNDYsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.6i1WE8oBQW_ZgW5Iz3f4dzVw0D0nRFsUaPbE7VnYXdQ&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Smarty app auto-suggestion address fields.")
5. Optionally add configuration information and send the envelope as described in
   the [Example: Enable Postal Address Data Verification Fields](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=sxg1715711598510.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to set up Postal Address Data Verification Fields for documents in Docusign envelopes or templates.") article.

   When signers receive the envelope, they enter information in
   Address Line 1 to activate the address
   suggestions.

title: Select Data Verification Fields for Envelopes and Templates
heading_path: Select Data Verification Fields for Envelopes and Templates
text: Learn how to select and include Docusign Data Verification fields from third-party applications for documents in Docusign envelopes or templates.

title: Select Data Verification Fields for Envelopes and Templates
heading_path: Select Data Verification Fields for Envelopes and Templates
text:
Make sure the Data Verification apps you want to use have been installed by someone with administrator privileges as described in the [Install Docusign Apps for Data Verification](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=pyp1698158616536.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to install Data Verification apps from the Docusign App Center.") article.

Data Verification fields are a type of eSignature agreement preparation field that can connect with third-party applications. Use these fields to verify information such as email or phone number in real-time. Use these fields to verify data in envelopes or templates. For detailed information about setting up fields for an envelope or template, see the [Document Custom Fields](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=pik1583277475390&topicId=crp1583277382187.html&_LANG=enus) article or the [Create a template](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=xry1643227563338&topicId=lsg1578456368117.html&_LANG=enus) article.

Note: Docusign offers another option to verify signer input: Data Validation for text fields. With Data Validation for text fields, your signer is prompted to provide correctly formatted data. See the [Data Validation for Text Fields](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=gbo1643332197980&topicId=jgd1578456357365.html&_LANG=enus) article to learn more about this feature.

1. Start an envelope with the Send an Envelope option or use a template.
2. Upload your files and add recipients as usual.
3. On the Add Fields page, select a data verification field.
   1. Basic Data Verification fields display in the Standard fields section.

      ![A screenshot of selecting a Basic Docusign Data Verification field.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvnewbasicselect.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyMzIsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.VNsFoEe12hiPkO0UQI27t7HR0v2G4dJNQiQgZq28GR8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of selecting a Basic Docusign Data Verification field.")
   2. Premium Data Verification fields display in the Custom fields section.

      ![A screenshot of selecting a Premium Docusign Data Verification field.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvnewpremiumselect.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyMzIsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.VNsFoEe12hiPkO0UQI27t7HR0v2G4dJNQiQgZq28GR8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of selecting a Premium Docusign Data Verification field.")

   For details about Basic and Premium field types, see the [Docusign Data Verification Field Types](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=omw1740164520691.html&_LANG=enus "Learn about the different types of Docusign Data Verification Fields that you can use in your eSignature envelope preparation.") article.
4. Drag the appropriate fields to the document.

   Tip: You can select a field group where users can specify information types, such as the bank account type information.

   The following example shows selected email address and Social Security number information Data Verification fields.

   ![A screenshot of a sample field group for email and social security number information.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/qki1698158012210/page/images/dvfieldgroup.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyMzIsInNoZWFmIjoicWtpMTY5ODE1ODAxMjIxMCJ9.VNsFoEe12hiPkO0UQI27t7HR0v2G4dJNQiQgZq28GR8&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample field group for email and social security number information.")

   Note: If you attempt to delete an individual required field from a group, the following warning displays and you cannot change the field group.

title: Select Data Verification Fields for Envelopes and Templates
heading_path: Select Data Verification Fields for Envelopes and Templates
text:
for email and social security number information.")

   Note: If you attempt to delete an individual required field from a group, the following warning displays and you cannot change the field group.

   `Individual fields cannot be deleted from a verification group. Select all fields in the group to delete them.`
5. Review the verification type and the apps that work with the selected verification fields.
6. Select Must verify to sign to prevent recipients from completing the envelope unless this verification successfully passes.

   Note:

   The Must verify to sign is an optional setting. Be selective when selecting this setting to avoid false negatives. Even if you choose not to turn on the Must verify to sign setting, the data entered into your document's data verification fields are verified in real-time during signing.
7. After you've added all fields, select Send.

   For detailed information about sending envelopes, see the [Sending Documents for Signature](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=ulp1643236876813&topicId=lak1578456412477.html&_LANG=enus) article.
8. Optionally track data verification data in the envelope history and Certificate of Completion (CoC) as described in the [Review Data Verification Events](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=cxe1701287400366.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to use your Docusign account's envelope history and Certificate of Completion to determine whether the data verification passed or failed.") article.

title: Auto-install for Docusign Data Verification Apps
heading_path: Auto-install for Docusign Data Verification Apps
text:
When you select Data Verification Fields, the auto-install feature installs the Docusign Data Verification app in the
background,
without requiring further user action..

The auto-install feature streamlines deploying Docusign Data
Verification packaged extension apps.

When you [Select Data Verification Fields for Envelopes and Templates](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=yvx1699550441650.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to select and include Docusign Data Verification fields from third-party applications for documents in Docusign envelopes or templates.") and select the field, the app auto-installs
in the background, without requiring further user action.

Packaged extension apps are included in plans at no extra cost and do not require
connections with third-party accounts to be created.

Packaged Data Verification apps are designated as Approved Apps for installation.

See the [Non-admin Users: Work with Approved
Apps](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=xni1748970087448&topicId=xni1748970087448.html&_LANG=enus) article for information about using Approved Apps.

These apps are currently
auto-installed
for entitled accounts.

- [Smarty (postal address verification)](https://apps.docusign.com/app-center/app/04bfc1ae-1ba0-42d0-8c02-264417a7b234)
- [Twilio](https://apps.docusign.com/app-center/app/6ff9ae39-ad45-4d04-b0c2-a6e2214f5925) (email verification)
- [SSN and FEIN Verification](https://apps.docusign.com/app-center/app/b1adf7ad-38fd-44ba-85f5-38ea87f4af23) (by LexisNexis)

  Note: U.S. customers only. This app requires the Premium Data
  Verification add-on SKU or the IAM for CX plan.
- [Vonage](https://apps.docusign.com/app-center/app/d16f398f-8b9a-4f94-b37c-af6f9c910c04) (phone verification)

title: Sign a Document With Data Verification Fields
heading_path: Sign a Document With Data Verification Fields
text:
Learn how to sign a document that has fields with data that must be verified before
successfully signing the document.

With Data Verification Fields in a Docusign document, the verified data is
authenticated against data sources in real-time. For example, when completing an
employment application, you must verify your email address and phone number.

When you complete the signing field entries, the information you enter is
authenticated by a third-party application. Upon verification, you can complete the
signing.

Note: Your organization may create custom Data Verification Fields specific
to your company. See the [Data Verification
Field Types](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=omw1740164520691.html&_LANG=enus) article for details.

1. Open the document as described in the [Get Started on the Docusign Signing Welcome Page](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=yca1573855023892&topicId=uwx1573854978359.html&_LANG=enus) article.
2. Fields that require verification are indicated by a tool tip when you hover
   over them, as shown in the following example:

   ![An example of a tool tip for a data field that must be verified when signing a document.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/dvreqfieldtip.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNzYsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.UMwrSDPPuyxf0ftwomJeENNvBcFYPGCb3HwSN9jQQcc&_LANG=enus "An example of a tool tip for a data field that must be verified when signing a document.")
3. Enter the information and go to the next field.

   Note: If you're entering a phone number, you
   are required to include both the country code and phone number.

   While validating, the system displays the following message:

   `Verifying data`
4. If you correctly entered the information, you received a verification
   confirmation message.

   `Verification succeeded`
5. If you incorrectly entered the information, you receive a failed verification
   message:

   `Verification failed`

   Review and reenter your information.
6. Continue entering information in any subsequent fields.

   ![A screenshot of a sample document with Data Verification Fields.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signing-example.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNzYsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.UMwrSDPPuyxf0ftwomJeENNvBcFYPGCb3HwSN9jQQcc&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of a sample document with Data Verification Fields.")
7. Select Finish to complete the signing process.
8. To review the audit trail details about the agreements you signed, select the
   vertical three-dot menu and select View History to view
   the envelope history or View Certificate to view the
   Certificate of Completion.

   ![A screenshot of the Other Actions menu audit trail options.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/yca1573855023892/page/images/signnewviewcert.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MDcyNzYsInNoZWFmIjoieWNhMTU3Mzg1NTAyMzg5MiJ9.UMwrSDPPuyxf0ftwomJeENNvBcFYPGCb3HwSN9jQQcc&_LANG=enus "A screenshot of the Other Actions menu audit trail options.")

   See these articles for detailed audit information:

   - [Envelope history](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=uro1698158848949.html): Includes a list of sender
     and recipient activities to date
   - [Certificate of Completion](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=qki1698158012210&topicId=qjs1701290377826.html): Includes the
     identifying information about the envelope and complete details of the
     envelope events
